headline: If Oil Hits $100, Delta and United Are in Trouble
summary: If WTI crude oil climbs to $100 a barrel over the next 12 months, both Delta Air Lines (DAL) and United Airlines (UAL) will see their 2026 earnings guidance evaporate, and their stocks, already down hard in 2026, will fall another 20% or more from current levels. It’s a direct threat to guidance built on ... If Oil Hits $100, Delta and United Are in Trouble

headline: One year after Trump’s sovereignty threats, Canadians keep ‘elbows up’
summary: An unusual swell of Canadian patriotism seen after Trump's threats and tariffs last year has evolved into a new social and economic order.

headline: This Week's Market Wrap: Energy, Defense Stocks Take The Lead As Oil Prices Spike Higher
summary: Crude oil futures rose dramatically throughout the week, climbing from roughly $71 per barrel at the start of the week to above $90 by Friday. Read more here.
